title: Dungeon Crawl Feed
subtitle: Floor Broadcast // Princess Donut Network
footer: Dungeon management denies responsibility for curses, lava, celebrity felines, emotional damage, or surprise quests.
headline: Field Report
speaker: Carl
quote: The dungeon doesn't just want you dead. It wants you tired, humiliated, and useful first.
flavor: Recorded during a brief pause between violence and administration.
